Video.title: Defying Gravity

Video.title: The YouTube Effect

Video.title: Rockets: Mid-Air, 3D Printed & Moon Turtles

Video.summary: Geologists believe they've uncovered a massive eighth continent: Zealandia;
Video.title: Zealandia/Extinction

Video.title: Touching the Sun/Exoplanets

Video.summary: The critical Greenland ice sheet is melting, and scientists are seeking ways to preserve it.
Video.title: Greenland Melting/Miami Underwater

Video.title: Making Babies/Dog's Nose

Video.title: Space and Beyond
